offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, manual report generation causes compliance issues. We automate report generation and email distribution instead of manual report generation and email distribution.
problem: Timely generation of tax withholding reports for multiple clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for tool sharing
try_it: Let users generate monthly tax withholding reports on 1-3 clients
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
